{{CargoRelic
|name=BetaGo
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=09-06
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Evolution Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Sep 6, 2017, BetaGo became the first robot to defeat the human Go champion. 

BetaGo is a program that uses the artificial neural network and algorithms to collect a large number of matrix numbers and takes weights through a nonlinear activation method to generate a set of data. Through a number of matrices, multiple layers of the organization are linked together to form a neural network, which can be used for precise and complex processing. With such complex algorithms, it has become the top master in the Go world.

[Basic Info]

Designers: Demis, David, etc.<br>Major events: Man vs AI in Go<br>Main feat: Defeating the top human Go players
|fame=44
|art=52
|fth=36
|civ=40
|tech=71
|ss1=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +40<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss2=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +80<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss3=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +120<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +20<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss4=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +200<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +28<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss5=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +280<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +36<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss7=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +280<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +36<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle, Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Bharata skill II.png|50px]] Place in Bharata Museum: In Bharata, 2x Green Card Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Bharata skill II.png|50px]] Place in Bharata Museum: In Bharata, 2x Blue Card Drops +7.5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Bharata Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Bharata Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Minion HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Rocket Tech LVL]]
